# Slice 1: Plant List

> **Depends on:** None

## Goal

User can browse all their plants in a responsive grid.

## Scope

- plant-list module: Grid layout, plant cards, navigation to detail

## Acceptance Criteria

### Visual [visual]

- [ ] Shows a 3-column grid
- [ ] Each card has a thumbnail

### Interactive [interactive]

- [ ] Clicking a card opens detail view
